$comment: Example Source Mirror config. Copy into the brain repo and edit. The CI runner invokes: bun run mirror run --repo <brain-repo> --config mirror.config.json [--apply]. Credentials are NEVER in this file — Drive reads an rclone remote (human `rclone config`), Notion reads NOTION_TOKEN from the environment (a human-provisioned secret). Obsidian is intentionally absent: it is not an API-fetched leg (see templates/mirror/obsidian-setup.md).
